sections.paragraph:
ἐπαίρω [ἐπί, αἴρω] ‘raise up over’

—a. of physical action lift up: hands Lk 24:50; 1 Ti 2:8; sail Ac 27:40; eyes (in sense of look up) Mt 17:8; Lk 16:23; J 4:35; 6:5; 17:1; voice (in sense of raise so as to be heard) Lk 11:27; heel, in a crushing gesture J 13:18; of Jesus ascending Ac 1:9.

—b. of personal attitude, in description of arrogance be in opposition 2 Cor 10:5; cp. put on airs 11:20.
